_meta: Visual-grounded LUT description rewrites. Generated by claude reading lut-tour/*.jpg (137 LUTs applied to LUT_test.JPEG = a Dali lakeside dusk scene) side-by-side with the baseline. Each entry replaces the manifest's description with what the LUT actually does on a real photo, plus updates tags. Focuses on entries where the original description was generic (e.g. 'variant 2') and on visually-distinctive variants (Cold/Warm/cross-process). t3 film-stock canonical descriptions are kept where the visual difference on this test image is too subtle to add new signal.

rt-color-creativepack-1-bleachbypass1.description: extreme bleach-bypass — sky blown to near-white, deep cool cyan-blue cast through midtones and shadows, near-monochrome low-saturation, harsh hi-contrast desaturated look

rt-color-creativepack-1-bleachbypass2.description: subtle bleach-bypass — mild desaturation with a light cool cast lifted into highlights; preserves most of the original colour, gentle contrast bump

rt-color-creativepack-1-bleachbypass3.description: mild bleach-bypass that keeps warm sky and horizon — mutes mid-tone saturation, slight matte feel, retains golden-hour warmth

rt-color-creativepack-1-bleachbypass4.description: strong bleach-bypass — midtones pushed toward monochrome silver-grey while sky retains gentle warmth; cinematic Saving-Private-Ryan look with high contrast and crushed shadows

rt-color-creativepack-1-edgyember.description: heavy ember-orange wash — entire frame engulfed in amber/burnt-orange tone; sky burning, water olive-brown, fire-glow or apocalyptic sunset mood

rt-color-creativepack-1-futuristicbleak1.description: subtle futuristic-bleak — cool teal-cyan in shadows with warm yellow horizon retained, mild teal-orange feel, muted contrast, dystopian-lite

rt-color-creativepack-1-futuristicbleak2.description: futuristic-bleak with strong teal-green cast — sky muted yellow-green, water deep teal, dystopian and subdued, mid-contrast

rt-color-creativepack-1-futuristicbleak3.description: heavy lime-green futuristic wash — midtones drenched in sickly yellow-green, near-monochrome with green cast, post-apocalyptic feel

rt-color-creativepack-1-futuristicbleak4.description: near-monochrome cool grey-blue — heavily desaturated dystopian sci-fi look, ghostly cold tonality, very low colour saturation throughout

rt-color-creativepack-1-tealmagentagold.description: pastel teal-magenta-gold — pink-magenta sky, soft purple-blue water, dreamy candy palette with low contrast; fairytale or sunset-romance mood

rt-color-creativepack-1-tealorange.description: classic Hollywood teal-orange — water and shadows pulled to deep teal-cyan, sky and highlights warm orange-yellow; high-contrast blockbuster look

rt-color-creativepack-1-tealorange1.description: teal-orange variant 1 — slightly stronger teal saturation in shadows than the base teal-orange, otherwise the same Hollywood high-contrast split

rt-color-creativepack-1-tealorange2.description: subdued teal-orange with green-yellow midtones — moodier, mossier take on the Hollywood split; less saturated, more naturalistic

rt-color-creativepack-1-tealorange3.description: clean gentle teal-orange — water deep teal, sky soft yellow horizon, mild contrast; understated cinematic split-tone

rt-color-creativepack-1-tensiongreen1.description: tension-green — olive-green sky and water, sickly thriller-movie atmosphere, moderate desaturation; suspense-film palette

rt-color-creativepack-1-tensiongreen2.description: tension-green variant 2 — dark teal-green throughout, brooding noir feel, deeper than tensiongreen1

rt-color-creativepack-1-tensiongreen3.description: tension-green variant 3 — mint-cyan sky and lighter teal water, more pastel and cooler than tensiongreen1, less ominous

rt-color-creativepack-1-tensiongreen4.description: tension-green variant 4 — very dark olive-grey midtones, near-monochrome with green cast, ominous noir-thriller feel

rt-color-creativepack-1-candlelight.description: warm candlelight wash — amber-gold cast like firelight glow, soft sepia feel, intimate indoor-evening mood

rt-color-creativepack-1-crispwarm.description: crisp warm boost — clean amplification of sunset/golden-hour warmth, retains natural blues in shadows; punchy but believable warm tones

rt-color-creativepack-1-crispwinter.description: crisp winter palette — bright blue daylight sky, cool icy water, fresh nordic morning feel; high clarity in blues

rt-color-creativepack-1-dropblues.description: drop-blues — strips blue from sky and water leaving neutral-grey midtones; warm sunset horizon survives, lake turns dull steel-grey

rt-color-creativepack-1-fallcolors.description: fall colors — enhanced autumn warmth, sky pushed golden, mountains lifted warm; saturated amber-and-rust palette

rt-color-creativepack-1-foggynight.description: foggy night — dark navy-blue cast throughout, deep moody nocturnal feel, lifted shadows just enough to read, faux day-for-night

rt-color-creativepack-1-horrorblue.description: horror-blue — heavy cool cyan-blue cast everywhere, deep teal-blue water, desaturated foreboding atmosphere; thriller/horror suspense palette

rt-color-creativepack-1-latesunset.description: late-sunset purple — heavy magenta-purple cast over a golden sky and deep violet water; romantic moody dusk, far past warm golden hour

rt-color-creativepack-1-moonlight.description: moonlight — very dark deep-navy cast throughout, crushed low-key brightness, midnight-blue mood; faux night-scene from a day capture

rt-color-creativepack-1-nightfromday.description: night-from-day — dark navy day-for-night conversion, less crushed than moonlight, deep cool blue cast that simulates nighttime under sunlight

rt-color-creativepack-1-smokey.description: smokey — hazy desaturated atmosphere; sky pale tan, water grey-brown, muted neutral palette like smoke or dust drifting through the frame

rt-color-creativepack-1-softwarming.description: soft warming — gentle pinkish warm cast with light brightening; natural and flattering, soft pastel dusk mood

rt-color-creativepack-1-anime.description: anime — vibrant punchy saturation with bright blue sky and clear primary colours; clean high-saturation look like stylised animation

rt-color-creativepack-1-colornegative.description: color-negative — literal photographic negative inversion; sky becomes orange-brown, water tan, foliage and curtains cyan, like staring at a film negative

rt-color-creativepack-1-redblueyellow.description: red-blue-yellow primary boost — subtle warm sky and slightly cooler water with balanced punchy primary palette; mild but vivid

rt-black-and-white-agfa-agfa-apx-100.description: Agfa APX 100 — classic balanced B&W with mid-grey tonality, smooth highlight rolloff, natural European traditional film feel

rt-black-and-white-agfa-agfa-apx-25.description: Agfa APX 25 — ultra-fine-grain slow B&W, clean highlights and smooth tonal range; fine-art landscape and detail

rt-black-and-white-rollei-rollei-ir-400.description: Rollei IR 400 infrared B&W — sky and foliage burned dark, water near-black, surreal high-contrast dreamy infrared look with white leaves and black skies

rt-black-and-white-rollei-rollei-ortho-2.description: Rollei Ortho 25 orthochromatic B&W — bright lifted highlights, smooth midtones, ethereal soft tonality (red-insensitive emulsion, vintage portrait feel)

rt-black-and-white-rollei-rollei-retro-1.description: Rollei Retro 100 Tonal — subdued mid-grey range with very smooth midtones, slightly cooler vintage B&W with fine grain

rt-black-and-white-rollei-rollei-retro-8.description: Rollei Retro 80s — punchier B&W with stronger contrast, deeper shadows, vintage gritty 80s newspaper-photography feel

rt-color-agfa-agfa-precisa-100.description: Agfa Precisa 100 — clean neutral slide film with balanced colour, slight blue cast in shadows, fine grain; understated European slide-film palette

rt-color-agfa-agfa-ultra-color-100.description: Agfa Ultra Color 100 — saturated slide film with pink-pushed sunsets and deep blue water; punchy contrast, advertising-vivid colour

rt-color-agfa-agfa-vista-200.description: Agfa Vista 200 — warm everyday colour neg with slight warm cast and casual snapshot character; European holiday-snapshot feel

rt-color-fuji-fuji-400h-3.description: Fuji Pro 400H — the pastel wedding-aesthetic darling; soft mint-green shadows, gently desaturated, low contrast, faintly cool skin tones

rt-color-fuji-fuji-800z-4.description: Fuji Pro 800Z — cool-leaning portrait neg with faint mint cast in shadows, warm sky retained, low-light wedding-friendly character

rt-color-fuji-fuji-fp-100c-cool-3.description: Fuji FP-100c Cool variant — instant peel-apart with cool blue-leaning sky and water, gentle desaturation, slightly milky cinematic instant feel

rt-color-fuji-fuji-fp-100c-negative-3.description: Fuji FP-100c Negative — slightly purple-pink cast in shadows, soft pastel mids, peel-apart instant character; the negative side yields a moody soft look

rt-color-fuji-fuji-sensia-100.description: Fuji Sensia 100 — balanced clean slide film with slight green-leaning saturation, neutral overall character

rt-color-fuji-fuji-superia-1600-4.description: Fuji Superia 1600 — high-speed consumer neg with faintly pastel purple shadows, mild desaturation; gritty low-light snapshot character

rt-color-fuji-fuji-superia-200-xpro.description: Fuji Superia 200 cross-processed — extreme blue-cyan wash across the entire frame with magenta highlights; surreal lo-fi lomography vibe, no preserved natural colour

rt-color-fuji-fuji-superia-reala-100.description: Fuji Superia Reala 100 — clean, balanced casual neg with very natural look, slight warmth, fine grain character

rt-color-fuji-fuji-astia-100-generic.description: Fuji Astia 100 — soft-skin pro slide with muted saturation and creamy mids, low-contrast portrait-friendly character

rt-color-fuji-fuji-provia-400x.description: Fuji Provia 400X — clean neutral high-speed slide with mid-saturation, faithful colour reproduction

rt-color-kodak-kodak-e-100-gx-ektachrome.description: Kodak Ektachrome E-100 GX — warm-tone slide with sunny mild sunset enhancement, gentle Kodachrome-adjacent palette

rt-color-kodak-kodak-elite-100-xpro.description: Kodak Elite 100 cross-processed — EXTREME teal-cyan wash across the entire frame, magenta-yellow highlights, surreal lo-fi lomography effect; all natural colour displaced

rt-color-kodak-kodak-elite-color-200.description: Kodak Elite Color 200 — very natural-looking slide with slight blue-leaning saturation, mild punchy contrast, balanced colour

rt-color-kodak-kodak-elite-color-400.description: Kodak Elite Color 400 — slightly more saturated than Elite 200 with pink-magenta sunset enhanced and deeper blue water; high-iso slide character

rt-color-kodak-kodak-elite-extracolor-10.description: Kodak Elite ExtraColor 100 — slightly warmer and more saturated than standard Elite slides, advertising-vivid colour pop

rt-color-kodak-kodak-kodachrome-25.description: Kodak Kodachrome 25 — vintage warm-leaning with slightly muted blues and fine grain, classic National Geographic Kodachrome warmth

rt-color-kodak-kodak-kodachrome-64-gener.description: Kodak Kodachrome 64 — slightly punchier than Kodachrome 25 with same warm vintage character, signature deep blues

rt-color-kodak-kodak-portra-160-1.description: Kodak Portra 160 — soft pastel warmth with low contrast and creamy neutral mids; flattering portrait-skin colour neg

rt-color-kodak-kodak-portra-400-4.description: Kodak Portra 400 — the warm wedding-and-editorial classic with golden skin tones, milky highlights, faintly lifted blacks; forgiving exposure latitude

rt-color-kodak-kodak-portra-800-hc.description: Kodak Portra 800 HC — high-contrast variant of Portra 800 with boosted contrast over the standard Portra family, retains warm skin character

rt-black-and-white-polaroid-polaroid-664.description: Polaroid 664 — peel-apart B&W instant with balanced contrast and mid-grey tones, slightly soft instant-photo feel

rt-black-and-white-polaroid-polaroid-665.description: Polaroid 665 — peel-apart B&W with sharp documentary contrast, mid-grey tones, classic instant-photo character
Polaroid 665 Negative HC — high-contrast variant; brighter highlights, harsh contrast, sky pushed light, gritty newspaper-instant feel

rt-black-and-white-polaroid-polaroid-667.description: Polaroid 667 — high-speed peel-apart B&W instant, slightly more contrast than 664, moderate grain, low-light reportage

rt-black-and-white-polaroid-polaroid-672.description: Polaroid 672 — medium-speed peel-apart B&W instant with smoother midtones, slightly muted compared to 665

rt-color-polaroid-polaroid-669-3.description: Polaroid 669 (variant 3) — clean pastel peel-apart with soft warm sky and cool blue water shadows, slightly lifted blacks, classic 70s instant feel

rt-color-polaroid-polaroid-669-5.description: Polaroid 669 (variant 5) — warmer pastel than variant 3, pink-purple sky tint, warm horizon, more vintage faded character

rt-color-polaroid-polaroid-669-cold-3.description: Polaroid 669 Cold — strong cyan-teal cast over sky and water, cool cinematic instant peel-apart feel; the cinematic-cold polaroid look

rt-color-polaroid-polaroid-690-3.description: Polaroid 690 — warm peel-apart with soft warm sky, neutral water, slight pinkish cast in highlights; stronger saturation than 669

rt-color-polaroid-polaroid-690-cold-3.description: Polaroid 690 Cold — moderate blue cast across sky and water, less extreme than 669-cold but still cool-leaning peel-apart instant

rt-color-polaroid-polaroid-690-warm-3.description: Polaroid 690 Warm — slightly warmer than base 690 with light amber tint in highlights and gentle pastel mood

rt-color-polaroid-polaroid-polachrome.description: Polaroid Polachrome — balanced instant slide film look with slight muted tonality, vintage 80s presentation feel

rt-color-polaroid-polaroid-px-100uv-cold.description: Polaroid PX-100UV+ Cold — near-monochrome desaturated cool grey-cyan, looks like tinted B&W; ghostly modern Impossible Project tungsten feel

rt-color-polaroid-polaroid-px-100uv-warm.description: Polaroid PX-100UV+ Warm — warm tan-sepia near-monochrome, very desaturated like vintage tinted B&W; warm Impossible Project modern instant

rt-color-polaroid-polaroid-px-680-3.description: Polaroid PX-680 — warm yellow-gold cast with soft pastel and lifted blacks, vintage faded 600-series Impossible Project polaroid

rt-color-polaroid-polaroid-px-680-cold-3.description: Polaroid PX-680 Cold — cool teal-yellow split; sky pale teal, water deep blue-teal; cinematic instant Impossible Project cold cast

rt-color-polaroid-polaroid-px-680-warm-3.description: Polaroid PX-680 Warm — strong warm cream-amber wash, classic warm faded polaroid mood; sunny vintage instant

rt-color-polaroid-polaroid-px-70-3.description: Polaroid PX-70 — yellow-green vintage tint with lifted blacks, pastel mids, slight cross-process feel; modern SX-70-style Impossible Project

rt-color-polaroid-polaroid-px-70-cold-3.description: Polaroid PX-70 Cold — teal-yellow split with warm yellow sky and dark teal water; cool SX-70-style Impossible Project instant

rt-color-polaroid-polaroid-px-70-warm-3.description: Polaroid PX-70 Warm — strong warm cream-amber wash, sepia-faded photo look; vintage SX-70-style warm Impossible Project

rt-color-polaroid-polaroid-time-zero-exp.description: Polaroid Time Zero (Expired) — heavy orange-sepia wash across everything, lifted blacks, bleached faded vintage instant look; classic expired-film look — every colour pulled toward amber
Polaroid Time Zero (Expired) Cold — slightly less yellow than the base expired Time Zero; still orange-amber faded wash but cooler cast in shadows

rt-color-lomography-lomography-redscale-.description: Lomography Redscale 100 — film loaded backwards, flame-orange-to-red cast across the entire image; on this dusk shot stays moderate, but pushes amber-leaning shadows

rt-color-lomography-lomography-x-pro-sli.description: Lomography X-Pro Slide 200 — cross-processed slide with surreal saturation, blue-cyan shadows and magenta-yellow highlights; lomography signature creative effect
